channel.title: Cve on CloudNativePG - PostgreSQL Operator for Kubernetes
channel.description: Recent content in Cve on CloudNativePG - PostgreSQL Operator for Kubernetes

item.title: CloudNativePG 1.29.1 and 1.28.3 released: critical CVE fix
item.description: CloudNativePG 1.29.1 and 1.28.3 are now available. These releases address CVE-2026-44477 (Critical, CVSS 9.4) in the metrics exporter, remediate additional CVEs in pgx and the Go runtime, and ship important HA fixes including a data-safety bug in the failover path. All users should upgrade immediately.
